rounds: Two weeks of same-safe outfits to work — Joy Police held that one pretty comfortably. The Apollo ring is the real moment though: someone literally asked about the half-naked man on your finger and you shut the door. That was a gimme and they took it.
pattern: They're letting you wear the thing but not letting you talk about it.
focus: One sentence about the ring. Just one. Next time someone asks, you don't have to explain Apollo — just say 'I like him' and let it land.
